dataCleaning.noteText: Data cleaning exclusions: 624 schools excluded before plotting (missing X: 216, missing Y: 487, invalid X: 0, invalid Y: 0, both axes overlap: 79). Counts are non-exclusive by axis. Regression and confidence bands are fit only on the 962 included schools.
